title: Hello, 8plus!
summary: Welcome to 8plus - your partner for frontend engineering, UX design, and technical consulting.
html:
Welcome to 8plus

Hello and welcome to 8plus! We're excited to launch our platform dedicated to frontend engineering, user experience design, and technical consulting.

What We Do

At 8plus, we specialize in:

  • Frontend Development: Modern web applications using Next.js, React, TypeScript
  • Architecture Design: System architecture, technology selection, code review
  • Technical Consulting: One-on-one guidance, team training, project assessment

Our Mission

We believe in building high-quality web applications with modern technology stacks while providing professional technical guidance and architectural advice.

Get Started

Ready to work with us? Book a consultation or view our projects to see what we can do for you.

This is our first blog post. Stay tuned for more technical insights, development tips, and industry updates!

title: Hello 8plus - 重新啟動
summary: 8plus.app 重新上線，採用 Next.js 15 + Velite 架構，專注於工程諮詢和技術分享。
html:
Hello 8plus - 重新啟動

歡迎來到 8plus.app！這是我的工程諮詢和技術分享平台的全新開始。

新架構

這次重建採用了現代化的技術棧：

  • Next.js 15 - 最新的 React 框架
  • Velite - 類型安全的內容管理
  • Tailwind CSS - 現代化的樣式框架
  • TypeScript - 類型安全的開發體驗

主要功能

1. 工程諮詢

提供專業的軟體工程諮詢服務，包括：

  • 前端架構設計
  • Next.js 應用開發
  • 技術選型建議
  • 程式碼審查和優化

2. 技術部落格

分享技術見解和實踐經驗：

  • 前端開發最佳實踐
  • 工程效率提升
  • 新技術探索

3. 專案展示

展示過往的技術專案和成果。

4. 線上預約

透過整合的 Cal.com 系統，可以直接預約諮詢時間。

設計理念

這次重建的核心理念是簡潔而強大：

  • 專注於內容和功能
  • 快速的載入速度
  • 優秀的使用者體驗
  • 易於維護和擴展

未來計畫

  • Phase 2: 新增使用者認證和受保護內容
  • 多語言支援 (i18n)
  • 更豐富的互動功能

感謝關注，期待與你的交流！

如有任何問題或合作意向，歡迎透過預約系統聯繫我。

title: Next.js 15 + Velite: Modern Content Management Solution
summary: Exploring the content management solution combining Next.js 15 with Velite, and why we chose this technology stack.
html:
Next.js 15 + Velite: Modern Content Management Solution

When building 8plus.app, I chose the Next.js 15 + Velite technology combination. This article shares the reasons for choosing this solution and practical experience.

Why Choose Velite?

1. Type Safety

Velite is based on Zod schema, providing complete TypeScript type support:

const posts = defineCollection({
  name: 'Post',
  pattern: 'content/posts/**/*.mdx',
  schema: s.object({
    title: s.string(),
    date: s.isodate(),
    tags: s.array(s.string()).optional(),
    summary: s.string(),
    published: s.boolean().default(true),
    content: s.mdx()
  })
})

2. Simple Yet Powerful

Compared to Contentlayer, Velite provides a cleaner API and better performance:

  • Faster build times
  • Less configuration
  • Better error messages

3. Next.js 15 Compatibility

Velite natively supports Next.js 15, avoiding version compatibility issues.

Practical Experience

Configuration File Structure

export default defineConfig({
  root: '.',
  output: {
    data: '.velite',
    assets: 'public/static',
    base: '/static/',
    clean: true
  },
  collections: { posts, projects },
  mdx: {
    rehypePlugins: [
      rehypeSlug,
      [rehypeAutolinkHeadings, { behavior: 'wrap' }]
    ]
  }
})

Using in React Components

import { posts } from '.velite'

export default function BlogPage() {
  const publishedPosts = posts
    .filter(post => post.published)
    .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime())
  
  return (
    <div>
      {publishedPosts.map(post => (
        <article key={post.slug}>
          <h2>{post.title}</h2>
          <p>{post.summary}</p>
        </article>
      ))}
    </div>
  )
}

Build Process

The build process is very simple:

velite && next build

Velite will:

  1. Scan MDX files
  2. Validate frontmatter
  3. Generate type definitions
  4. Compile content to JSON

Advantages Summary

  1. Developer Experience: Complete type support and intelligent hints
  2. Performance: Fast build and runtime performance
  3. Simplicity: Minimal configuration, maximum functionality
  4. Reliability: Data validation based on Zod

Conclusion

Next.js 15 + Velite is an excellent modern content management solution, especially suitable for:

  • Technical blogs
  • Documentation sites
  • Project showcases
  • Personal websites

If you're looking for a simple yet powerful content management solution, I highly recommend trying this combination.

Want to learn more technical details? Feel free to book a consultation time for in-depth discussion.

title: Next.js 15 + Velite: 現代內容管理方案
summary: 探索 Next.js 15 與 Velite 結合的內容管理解決方案，以及為什麼選擇這個技術組合。
html:
Next.js 15 + Velite: 現代內容管理方案

在建構 8plus.app 時，我選擇了 Next.js 15 + Velite 的技術組合。這篇文章分享選擇這個方案的原因和實踐經驗。

為什麼選擇 Velite？

1. 類型安全

Velite 基於 Zod schema，提供完整的 TypeScript 類型支援：

const posts = defineCollection({
  name: 'Post',
  pattern: 'content/posts/**/*.mdx',
  schema: s.object({
    title: s.string(),
    date: s.isodate(),
    tags: s.array(s.string()).optional(),
    summary: s.string(),
    published: s.boolean().default(true),
    content: s.mdx()
  })
})

2. 簡單而強大

相比 Contentlayer，Velite 提供了更簡潔的 API 和更好的效能：

  • 更快的建構速度
  • 更少的配置
  • 更好的錯誤提示

3. Next.js 15 相容性

Velite 原生支援 Next.js 15，避免了版本相容性問題。

實踐經驗

配置檔案結構

export default defineConfig({
  root: '.',
  output: {
    data: '.velite',
    assets: 'public/static',
    base: '/static/',
    clean: true
  },
  collections: { posts, projects },
  mdx: {
    rehypePlugins: [
      rehypeSlug,
      [rehypeAutolinkHeadings, { behavior: 'wrap' }]
    ]
  }
})

在 React 元件中使用

import { posts } from '.velite'

export default function BlogPage() {
  const publishedPosts = posts
    .filter(post => post.published)
    .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime())
  
  return (
    <div>
      {publishedPosts.map(post => (
        <article key={post.slug}>
          <h2>{post.title}</h2>
          <p>{post.summary}</p>
        </article>
      ))}
    </div>
  )
}

建構流程

建構流程非常簡單：

velite && next build

Velite 會：

  1. 掃描 MDX 檔案
  2. 驗證 frontmatter
  3. 生成類型定義
  4. 編譯內容為 JSON

優勢總結

  1. 開發體驗: 完整的類型支援和智慧提示
  2. 效能: 快速的建構和執行時效能
  3. 簡潔: 最少的配置，最大的功能
  4. 可靠: 基於 Zod 的資料驗證

結論

Next.js 15 + Velite 是一個優秀的現代內容管理方案，特別適合：

  • 技術部落格
  • 文件網站
  • 專案展示
  • 個人網站

如果你正在尋找一個簡單而強大的內容管理解決方案，強烈推薦嘗試這個組合。

想了解更多技術細節？歡迎預約諮詢時間深入討論。

title: Responsive Design Best Practices: From Mobile-First to Desktop Adaptation
summary: A comprehensive guide exploring core principles of responsive web design, from mobile-first strategies to cross-device user experience optimization.
html:
Responsive Design Best Practices: From Mobile-First to Desktop Adaptation

In modern web development, responsive design is no longer optional—it's essential. With users accessing websites from various devices, we need to ensure quality user experiences across all screen sizes.

Mobile-First Design Philosophy

Why Choose Mobile-First?

Mobile-first is not just a technical strategy, but a design philosophy:

  • Performance Optimization: Starting with small screens naturally focuses on core functionality and content
  • Progressive Enhancement: Gradually adding features for larger screens rather than removing them
  • User Behavior: Over 60% of website traffic comes from mobile devices

Implementing Mobile-First

/* Base styles (mobile devices) */
.container {
  padding: 1rem;
  max-width: 100%;
}

/* Tablet devices */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .container {
    padding: 2rem;
    max-width: 768px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
}

/* Desktop devices */
@media (min-width: 1024px) {
  .container {
    padding: 3rem;
    max-width: 1200px;
  }
}

Key Breakpoint Strategy

Common Breakpoint Settings

Based on actual device usage patterns, we recommend these breakpoints:

Device TypeWidth RangeBreakpoint
Mobile< 768pxDefault
Tablet768px - 1023pxmd:
Desktop1024px - 1279pxlg:
Large Screen≥ 1280pxxl:

Tailwind CSS Practice

<div className="
  grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 p-4
  md:grid-cols-2 md:gap-6 md:p-6
  lg:grid-cols-3 lg:gap-8 lg:p-8
  xl:grid-cols-4
">
  {/* Content */}
</div>

Responsive Image Handling

Next.js Image Component

import Image from 'next/image'

function ResponsiveImage() {
  return (
    <Image
      src="/hero-image.jpg"
      alt="Hero Image"
      width={1200}
      height={600}
      className="w-full h-auto"
      sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, (max-width: 1200px) 50vw, 33vw"
      priority
    />
  )
}

Key Optimization Points

  1. Proper sizes attribute: Tell the browser the image display width at different screen sizes
  2. Priority loading: Use priority attribute for important images
  3. Format optimization: Automatically select WebP or AVIF formats

Responsive Typography

Fluid Font Sizes

.heading {
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 3rem);
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.body-text {
  font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.125rem);
  line-height: 1.6;
}

Readability Optimization

  • Line Length Control: 45-75 characters per line for optimal reading experience
  • Line Height Adjustment: Use larger line heights on mobile devices (1.6-1.8)
  • Contrast: Ensure sufficient contrast between text and background

Interactive Element Adaptation

Touch-Friendly Design

.button {
  min-height: 44px; /* Apple's recommended minimum touch target */
  min-width: 44px;
  padding: 12px 24px;
  margin: 8px; /* Sufficient spacing to avoid accidental touches */
}

.nav-item {
  padding: 16px; /* Navigation items need larger touch areas */
}

Hover State Handling

/* Only show hover effects on devices that support hovering */
@media (hover: hover) {
  .button:hover {
    background-color: #0056b3;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }
}

Performance Optimization Strategies

Critical Rendering Path

  1. Inline Critical CSS: Styles needed for above-the-fold rendering
  2. Lazy Load Non-Critical Resources: Use loading="lazy"
  3. Preload Important Resources: <link rel="preload">

Code Splitting

// Dynamic component import
const HeavyComponent = dynamic(() => import('./HeavyComponent'), {
  loading: () => <div>Loading...</div>,
  ssr: false // If server-side rendering is not needed
})

Testing and Debugging

Development Tools

  1. Chrome DevTools: Device simulation and network throttling
  2. Lighthouse: Performance and accessibility assessment
  3. Real Device Testing: Actual device testing is irreplaceable

Key Metrics

  • First Contentful Paint (FCP): < 1.8s
  • Largest Contentful Paint (LCP): < 2.5s
  • Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS): < 0.1

Case Study: 8plus Website

In developing the 8plus website, we adopted the following responsive strategies:

Navigation Design

// Desktop navigation
<nav className="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-6">
  {navigation.map((item) => (
    <Link key={item.href} href={item.href}>
      {item.name}
    </Link>
  ))}
</nav>

// Mobile navigation
<Sheet>
  <SheetTrigger className="md:hidden">
    <Menu className="h-6 w-6" />
  </SheetTrigger>
  <SheetContent side="right">
    {/* Mobile navigation content */}
  </SheetContent>
</Sheet>

Content Layout

<div className="
  container py-8 
  md:py-16
">
  <div className="
    grid gap-8 
    lg:gap-12 
    md:grid-cols-2
  ">
    {/* Responsive grid layout */}
  </div>
</div>

Future Trends

Container Queries

@container (min-width: 400px) {
  .card {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: row;
  }
}

New Viewport Units

.hero {
  height: 100dvh; /* Dynamic Viewport Height */
  min-height: 100svh; /* Small Viewport Height */
}

Conclusion

The key to successful responsive design lies in:

  1. User-Centered Approach: Understanding user behavior on different devices
  2. Performance First: Ensuring good loading speeds on all devices
  3. Progressive Enhancement: Starting with basic functionality and gradually adding complexity
  4. Continuous Testing: Validating design effectiveness on real devices

Responsive design is not a one-time task, but an important aspect that requires continuous attention and optimization throughout the development process.

Want to learn more practical responsive design techniques? Feel free to book a technical consultation where we can discuss your specific projects in depth.

title: 響應式設計最佳實踐：從移動優先到桌面適配
summary: 深入探討響應式網頁設計的核心原則，從移動優先策略到跨設備用戶體驗優化的完整指南。
html:
響應式設計最佳實踐：從移動優先到桌面適配

在現代網頁開發中，響應式設計已經不再是可選項，而是必需品。隨著用戶使用各種設備訪問網站，我們需要確保在所有螢幕尺寸上都能提供優質的用戶體驗。

移動優先的設計理念

為什麼選擇移動優先？

移動優先（Mobile First）不僅僅是一種技術策略，更是一種設計哲學：

  • 性能優化：從小螢幕開始設計，自然會關注核心功能和內容
  • 漸進增強：逐步為更大的螢幕添加功能，而不是削減功能
  • 用戶行為：超過 60% 的網站流量來自移動設備

實踐移動優先

/* 基礎樣式（移動設備） */
.container {
  padding: 1rem;
  max-width: 100%;
}

/* 平板設備 */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .container {
    padding: 2rem;
    max-width: 768px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
}

/* 桌面設備 */
@media (min-width: 1024px) {
  .container {
    padding: 3rem;
    max-width: 1200px;
  }
}

關鍵斷點策略

常用斷點設置

基於實際設備使用情況，建議使用以下斷點：

設備類型寬度範圍斷點
手機< 768px預設
平板768px - 1023pxmd:
桌面1024px - 1279pxlg:
大螢幕≥ 1280pxxl:

Tailwind CSS 實踐

<div className="
  grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 p-4
  md:grid-cols-2 md:gap-6 md:p-6
  lg:grid-cols-3 lg:gap-8 lg:p-8
  xl:grid-cols-4
">
  {/* 內容 */}
</div>

圖片響應式處理

Next.js Image 組件

import Image from 'next/image'

function ResponsiveImage() {
  return (
    <Image
      src="/hero-image.jpg"
      alt="Hero Image"
      width={1200}
      height={600}
      className="w-full h-auto"
      sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, (max-width: 1200px) 50vw, 33vw"
      priority
    />
  )
}

關鍵優化點

  1. 適當的 sizes 屬性：告訴瀏覽器在不同螢幕尺寸下圖片的顯示寬度
  2. 優先載入：重要圖片使用 priority 屬性
  3. 格式優化：自動選擇 WebP 或 AVIF 格式

字體與排版響應式

流體字體大小

.heading {
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 3rem);
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.body-text {
  font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.125rem);
  line-height: 1.6;
}

可讀性優化

  • 行長控制：每行 45-75 個字符為最佳閱讀體驗
  • 行高調整：移動設備使用較大的行高（1.6-1.8）
  • 對比度：確保文字與背景有足夠的對比度

交互元素適配

觸控友好設計

.button {
  min-height: 44px; /* Apple 建議的最小觸控目標 */
  min-width: 44px;
  padding: 12px 24px;
  margin: 8px; /* 足夠的間距避免誤觸 */
}

.nav-item {
  padding: 16px; /* 導航項目需要更大的觸控區域 */
}

懸停狀態處理

/* 只在支持懸停的設備上顯示懸停效果 */
@media (hover: hover) {
  .button:hover {
    background-color: #0056b3;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }
}

性能優化策略

關鍵渲染路徑

  1. 內聯關鍵 CSS：首屏渲染所需的樣式
  2. 延遲載入非關鍵資源：使用 loading="lazy"
  3. 預載入重要資源：<link rel="preload">

代碼分割

// 動態導入組件
const HeavyComponent = dynamic(() => import('./HeavyComponent'), {
  loading: () => <div>載入中...</div>,
  ssr: false // 如果不需要服務端渲染
})

測試與調試

開發工具

  1. Chrome DevTools：設備模擬和網路節流
  2. Lighthouse：性能和可用性評估
  3. Real Device Testing：實際設備測試不可替代

關鍵指標

  • First Contentful Paint (FCP)：< 1.8s
  • Largest Contentful Paint (LCP)：< 2.5s
  • Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS)：< 0.1

實戰案例：8plus 網站

在 8plus 網站的開發中，我們採用了以下響應式策略：

導航設計

// 桌面版導航
<nav className="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-6">
  {navigation.map((item) => (
    <Link key={item.href} href={item.href}>
      {item.name}
    </Link>
  ))}
</nav>

// 移動版導航
<Sheet>
  <SheetTrigger className="md:hidden">
    <Menu className="h-6 w-6" />
  </SheetTrigger>
  <SheetContent side="right">
    {/* 移動導航內容 */}
  </SheetContent>
</Sheet>

內容佈局

<div className="
  container py-8 
  md:py-16
">
  <div className="
    grid gap-8 
    lg:gap-12 
    md:grid-cols-2
  ">
    {/* 響應式網格佈局 */}
  </div>
</div>

未來趨勢

Container Queries

@container (min-width: 400px) {
  .card {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: row;
  }
}

新的視口單位

.hero {
  height: 100dvh; /* Dynamic Viewport Height */
  min-height: 100svh; /* Small Viewport Height */
}

總結

響應式設計的成功關鍵在於：

  1. 以用戶為中心：理解不同設備上的用戶行為
  2. 性能優先：確保在所有設備上都有良好的載入速度
  3. 漸進增強：從基礎功能開始，逐步增加複雜性
  4. 持續測試：在真實設備上驗證設計效果

響應式設計不是一次性的工作，而是需要在整個開發過程中持續關注和優化的重要環節。

想了解更多響應式設計的實踐技巧？歡迎預約技術諮詢，我們可以針對你的具體項目進行深入討論。

title: AI Integration in Practice: From Demo to Operable Workflows
summary: RAG and agents are exciting — permissions, evaluation, and human-in-the-loop ops are where cost lives. A phased rollout framework from consulting work.
html:
AI Integration in Practice

A successful PoC does not mean production readiness. Common blockers: data quality, untraceable hallucinations, scattered prompts, no offline eval.

Phased rollout

PhaseGoal
0Define task + success metrics (accuracy, latency, cost)
1Single-path RAG + human review
2Tool use / agents + permission gates
3Monitoring, A/B, feedback loops

Engineering focus

  • Context engineering: chunking, metadata, versioning
  • Permissions: tenant/role isolation for vector stores
  • Observability: traces, citations, refusal policies

Need help scoping AI delivery? See services or contact.

title: AI 導入實戰：從 demo 到可維運工作流
summary: RAG 與 Agent 很酷，但上線後的權限、評估、人機協作才是成本中心。分享我協助團隊分階段導入 AI 的框架。
html:
AI 導入實戰

PoC 成功不代表能進 production。我見過太多專案卡在：資料品質、幻覺無法追責、prompt 散落各處、沒有 offline eval。

分階段導入

階段目標
0定義任務與成功指標（準確率、延遲、成本）
1單一路徑 RAG + 人工審核
2工具呼叫 / Agent + 權限閘道
3監控、A/B、回饋迴圈

工程要點

  • Context 工程：chunk、metadata、版本化
  • 權限：tenant / role 與向量庫隔離
  • Observability：trace、引用來源、拒答策略

需要協助評估 AI 落地？查看 服務 或 聯絡。

title: Architecture First: Why B2B Projects Need Boundaries Before Code
summary: In consulting engagements, the most common failure is not picking the wrong stack — it is sprinting without defined boundaries. A practical architecture-first checklist.
html:
Architecture First

Under pressure, teams often skip architecture and jump into sprints. It looks like progress — until API coupling, permission gaps, deployment drift, and UX state chaos show up mid-flight.

Four questions I ask first

  1. Where data originates and lands — single source of truth
  2. Who can do what in which state — permission and audit boundaries
  3. How the system degrades on failure — not just happy-path demos
  4. How we verify done — measurable completion criteria

Practical outputs

Within about a week you can have: system context, core API contracts, milestones, and a risk register. The goal is one shared map for product, design, and engineering.

Evaluating a rewrite or new platform? Book a 30-minute call.

title: 架構先行：為什麼 B2B 專案要先畫邊界再寫 code
summary: 在接案與顧問現場，最常見的失敗不是技術選錯，而是邊界沒定就開始衝刺。這篇整理我用的架構先行 checklist。
html:
架構先行

很多團隊在壓力下會跳過架構討論，直接進 sprint。短期看起來有進度，中期通常會遇到：API 耦合、權限漏洞、部署環境不一致、UX 狀態無法收斂。

我會先問的四件事

  1. 資料從哪來、到哪去 — 單一真相來源在哪？
  2. 誰能在什麼狀態做什麼 — 權限與審計邊界
  3. 失敗時怎麼退化 — 不是 happy path demo
  4. 怎麼驗證交付完成 — 可量測的 done 定義

實務產出

通常一週內可以產出：系統上下文圖、核心 API 契約、里程碑與風險清單。這些文件不是為了好看，而是讓 PO、設計、工程在同一張地圖上對話。

若你正在評估重構或新平台，歡迎 預約 30 分鐘對談。

title: Code Review Checklist: 12 Checks from a Consulting Lens
summary: Code review is not just style. This checklist focuses on operability, security boundaries, and delivery risk for B2B teams.
html:
Code Review Checklist

Architecture & boundaries

  • Single responsibility, sensible dependency direction
  • Versioned API contracts, consistent error codes
  • Config and secrets externalized

Reliability

  • Retries, timeouts, idempotency
  • Logs traceable by request id
  • Edge cases and empty states

Security

  • Input validation and output encoding
  • Authorization enforced server-side
  • No sensitive data in logs

Need external review or advisory support? See process.

title: Code Review Checklist：顧問視角的 12 項檢查
summary: Code Review 不只是 style。這份 checklist 聚焦可維運性、安全邊界與交付風險，適合 B2B 團隊內部或外部顧問使用。
html:
Code Review Checklist

架構與邊界

  • 模組職責是否單一、依賴方向是否合理
  • API 契約是否版本化、錯誤碼是否一致
  • 設定與 secret 是否外置

可靠性

  • 重試、timeout、冪等是否處理
  • 日誌是否可追蹤 request id
  • 邊界條件與空狀態

安全

  • 輸入驗證與輸出編碼
  • 授權檢查在 server 端
  • 敏感資料不落 log

需要外部 Review 或陪跑？見 合作流程。

title: Consulting Models: Retainer vs Project vs Workshop
summary: There is no single correct pricing model. When each engagement type fits — and the risks to watch.
html:
Consulting Models

Advisory Retainer

Best when you have engineers but need senior architecture and ongoing review. Lower risk, steady cadence.

Project Delivery

Best for new products or rewrites needing end-to-end ownership. Scope milestones and acceptance criteria matter.

Workshop

Best for AI alignment, architecture workshops, skill building. Deliver action items, not one-way training.

See pricing for ranges or book directly.

title: 接案合作模式：Retainer、專案制與工作坊怎麼選
summary: 沒有唯一正確的報價方式。這篇說明三種常見合作模式各自適合的團隊狀態與風險。
html:
接案合作模式

Advisory Retainer

適合已有工程團隊、需要資深架構視角與持續 Review。風險低、節奏穩。

Project Delivery

適合新產品或重構，需要端到端 ownership。範圍需寫清 milestone 與驗收標準。

Workshop

適合 AI 導入對齊、架構工作坊、技能提升。產出 action items，不是單向培訓。

詳細區間見 合作模式，或直接 預約。

title: Next.js 15 in Production: SSG, Content Pipeline, Performance
summary: 8plus runs on Next.js 15 + Velite. Patterns for shipping consulting and content sites to production.
html:
Next.js 15 in Production

Content pipeline

Velite generates type-safe collections at build time — a good fit for marketing + blog hybrids.

Performance

  • Static homepage + ISR where needed
  • Images via next/image or prebuilt OG assets
  • Keep client bundles lean — prefer CSS and restrained motion

SEO

Ship RSS, sitemap, and JSON-LD on launch day, not as a later patch.

This repo is the reference — browse the Lab.

title: Next.js 15 上線實務：SSG、內容管線與效能
summary: 8plus 站本身用 Next.js 15 + Velite。這篇整理內容站/顧問站在 production 的選型與踩坑。
html:
Next.js 15 上線實務

內容管線

Velite 在 build 時產生型別安全的 collections，比 runtime MDX 更適合 marketing + blog 混合站。

效能

  • 靜態首頁 + 按需 ISR（若需要）
  • 圖片走 next/image 或預生成 OG
  • 避免 client bundle 過大 — 首頁動效用 CSS + 節制 Framer Motion

SEO

RSS、sitemap、JSON-LD 應與 launch 同一天上線，不是「之後再補」。

本 repo 即為參考實作，歡迎 看 Lab。
